title: The Netherlands Records Its First Assisted Death of a Child Between 1 and 12
summary_full: Physician-assisted death for terminally ill children in that age group has been allowed in the country since 2024.
summary_public: Physician-assisted death for terminally ill children in that age group has been allowed in the country since 2024.

NL.label: neutral
